title: Kot Mumin Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kot Mumin with a Z-Score of +4.09. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kot Mumin is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 13.3 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 63% and the wind speed is 2.4 km/h, which is exacerbating the heat. 
 The city is experiencing a critical heat wave event with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) and high CDD, indicating a significant threat to the population.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect the population.
